## Summary

What does this PR add or change?

## Type of change

- [ ] New agent (`agents/devils-advocate-<domain>.md`)
- [ ] Improvement to existing agent
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Agent file follows the naming convention (`devils-advocate-<domain>.md`)
- [ ] YAML frontmatter includes `name`, `description`, and `model` fields
- [ ] `description` field clearly describes when Claude should invoke this agent
- [ ] Agent uses skeptical default — assumes code is wrong until proven otherwise
- [ ] Output format follows: **What** / **Where** / **Why it matters** / **Fix**
- [ ] No hallucinated tool names or non-existent framework APIs referenced
- [ ] README agent table updated (if adding a new agent)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` section updated
